based_on: Byte-precise mutation of fixtures/xor-per-neuron-bias.golden.jsonl. Differs in exactly 4 places: the 3 fixture_status fields and the single targeted topology.input_size integer field.

what_was_NOT_mutated: topology.unit_order.input (still ['x1','x2'] with length 2 — now contradicts input_size=3)
topology.hidden_size, topology.output_size (still match their respective unit_order array lengths)
all weights, biases, updates, forward, backward, loss

single_target_invariant: topology.input_size=3 contradicts topology.unit_order.input.length=2. The declared size must equal the array length — input_size IS the count of unit ids in the input layer.
purpose: Anti-circularity (Csmith/CompCert lineage) for the v0.4.1 Rule 0 structural-consistency reconciler: topology size declarations are redundant-with-unit_order metadata that must stay coherent. JSON Schema cannot express this cross-field invariant (would need conditional length matching), so a runtime check is the only enforcement.
